tr.td: Alkaline phosphatase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma
Alanine aminotransferase [Enzymatic activity/volume] in Serum or Plasma

Cholesterol in LDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma by Direct assay
Cholesterol in HDL [Mass/volume] in Serum or Plasma

tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows elevated creatinine, suggesting impaired renal function, and low total CO₂, which may indicate mild metabolic acidosis. Total protein and globulin are slightly decreased, possibly reflecting nutritional or hepatic issues. Lipid profile reveals elevated triglycerides and LDL cholesterol, increasing cardiovascular risk. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend clinical correlation and further evaluation of renal function, nutrition, and cardiovascular risk management.

display.value: Proteinuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Microalbuminuria due to type 2 diabetes mellitus
Acute ST segment elevation myocardial infarction
Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus
